notes: I haven't had any stability issues or crashes. However, performance is significantly worse than on Windows.  I have no problem maintaining locked 60fps on Windows even while doing something CPU heavy like screen capture. With proton, framerate jumps around between 40-60fps making it a stuttery experience. The framerate is low even though CPU and GPU usage is not particularly high. Depending on your hardware, YMMV.
title: DARK SOULS™ II: Scholar of the First Sin

notes:
The game runs flawlessly with one exception. The opening cut scene does not play play. When I start a new game it starts in engine with the player laying on the ground. The file Prologue.wmv doesn't play, but it is inside of the game folder. It isn't a huge deal I can watch it whenever I want but it is something that doesn't work.

Everything else has been working just fine. Online functionality works, notes work, I can see other players running around, bloodstains work. I have beaten The Last Giant and The Pursuer so far and I intend to keep playing the game.

title: DARK SOULS™ II: Scholar of the First Sin

notes:
I have bee playing Dark Souls 2 Scholar of the First Sin for close to 30 hours and I have not had a single issue.
Online functionality works fine, I have been invaded several times, I have summoned other players to help with boss fights, and that has worked fine. I have not yet put my summon sign down to help somebody else with a boss fight.

I have beaten The last Giant, The Pursuer, The Old Dragon Slayer, The Dragonrider, Flexile Sentry, Ruin Sentinels, Belfry Gargoyles, Lost Sinner, Royal Rat Vanguard, and The Rotton.

Boss Cut scenes have all played and summoning shades offline still works.

The only thing that has not worked is the opening cinematic, the game just completely skips it. I think that its because the video file is a WMV. if you browse to the location of the prologue.wmv file you can open it with VLC and it will play but I suspect that proton isn't able to play the WMV file so the game just skips the prologue.
title: DARK SOULS™ II: Scholar of the First Sin

notes: Runs perfectly out of the box!
title: DARK SOULS™ II: Scholar of the First Sin

notes: Runs flawlessly with no tweaks, solid 60FPS. Played new game through to Forest of the Giants with no crashes or performance issues, no graphical glitches. The only thing that stopped DS2SotFS getting a platinum rating is that the prologue video does not play. Other than that I would not have been able to tell if it was running on Windows or Linux.

notes: Runs perfectly with a controller, no issues whatsoever. On the off-chance you're playing with a mouse and keyboard (which you probably shouldn't do), it works fine until you Alt-Tab out and then back in. The game stops detecting mouse movement (mouse clicks still register, just moving to look around doesn't work). Performance was totally fine most of the time, but very occasionally  (once every few sessions) it'll randomly dip to ~40 fps, but pausing for a minute and unpausing fixes it.
